# Hcode Technologies - LLM Information

## Basic Information

- Site Name: Hcode Technologies
- Legal Name: Hcode Technologies Pvt Ltd
- URL: https://hcode.tech
- Description: World-class software development teams for startups and enterprises. We provide on-time delivery with transparent communication, specializing in AI integration, blockchain, MVP development, and team augmentation.
- Industry: Software Development, Technology Services, IT Consulting
- Founded: 2015
- Location: Karnal, Haryana, India

## Contact Information

- Email: hello@hcode.tech
- Website: https://hcode.tech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/hcodetech/

## Leadership Team

### Shashank Singla - Co-Founder
- Role: Co-Founder, CTO
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shashanksingla/
- Twitter: https://x.com/shashanksingla
- Medium: http://medium.com/@shashank.singla
- Email: shashank@hcode.tech
- Background: Product builder with 2 AI exits. Serial entrepreneur. Currently acts as CTO for an Adtech startup handling 350 million requests per day. Previously Head of Engineering at a NY-based blockchain startup.
- Experience: 14+ years
- Education: IIT Delhi, Class of 2010
- Notable Achievement: Exited Dextro, an AI video understanding platform acquired by Axon (publicly traded US company)
- Previous Companies: Human Ventures, Goldman Sachs, Dextro

### Shweta Singla - Co-Founder
- Role: Co-Founder
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shweta-singla/
- Email: shweta@hcode.tech
- Background: Ex-Vice President at Goldman Sachs with 9+ years as Quantitative Strategist. Expert in Machine Learning, Big Data, and Optimizations. Built heuristic solutions for NP-hard problems.
- Experience: 14+ years
- Education: IIT Delhi, Class of 2010
- Global Experience: Worked in New York, London, Bengaluru, and Delhi. Collaborated with teams from 15+ countries.
- Previous Companies: Goldman Sachs

### Rishabh Garg - Engineering Manager
- Role: Engineering Manager
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rishabh-garg-77023ab6/
- Email: rishabh.garg@hcode.tech
- Background: Highly experienced IT professional with expertise in Spring Framework, Core Java, Python, Node.js, and React.js. Specializes in large-scale enterprise applications.
- Experience: 14+ years
- Education: NIT Durgapur, Class of 2010
- Previous Companies: Siemens, Samsung, Infosys

### Mudit Sharma - Engineering Manager
- Role: Engineering Manager
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sharma-mudit/
- Email: mudit.sharma@hcode.tech
- Background: 16+ years of product development experience. Started at Hindustan Times with PHP and ASP .Net, advanced to Software Architect at SynapseIndia, spent 9.5 years at Sendinblue (now Brevo) managing Node.js teams.
- Experience: 16+ years
- Graduation: 2008
- Specialization: Node.js and React.js team leadership
- Previous Companies: Brevo/Sendinblue, SynapseIndia, Hindustan Times

## Services Offered

1. **AI Integration Services**
   - AI-powered solutions for business automation
   - Machine learning implementation
   - AI product development
   - URL: https://hcode.tech/our-services/ai-integration-services

2. **Blockchain Development**
   - Blockchain solution architecture
   - Smart contract development
   - Decentralized application (DApp) development
   - URL: https://hcode.tech/our-services/blockchain-development-services

3. **MVP Development**
   - Rapid prototype development
   - Product validation
   - Market-ready MVP in weeks
   - URL: https://hcode.tech/our-services/mvp-development-services

4. **Team as a Service**
   - Dedicated development teams
   - Staff augmentation
   - Tech leadership
   - URL: https://hcode.tech/our-services/team-as-a-service

5. **Developer as a Service**
   - Individual expert developers
   - Flexible engagement models
   - URL: https://hcode.tech/our-services/developer-as-a-service

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: React.js, Next.js, Redux, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js, Python, Java, Spring Framework
- **Mobile**: React Native, Flutter
- **AI/ML**: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Machine Learning pipelines
- **Blockchain**: Ethereum, Solidity, Web3
- **Databases**: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis
- **Cloud**: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines

## Company Highlights

- **Experience**: Over 9 years in business
- **Team Size**: 50+ developers and technical specialists
- **Global Reach**: Serving clients across USA, Europe, and Asia
- **Delivery Model**: On-time delivery with transparent communication
- **Specialization**: Startups and enterprise solutions
- **Notable Exits**: Founders have successful AI company exits (Dextro acquired by Axon)
- **Enterprise Clients**: Work with Fortune 500 companies and fast-growing startups

## Value Proposition

Hcode Technologies provides world-class software development teams with:
- Proven track record of on-time delivery
- Transparent communication throughout project lifecycle
- Expert technical leadership with startup and enterprise experience
- Flexibility in engagement models (dedicated teams, staff augmentation, project-based)
- Deep expertise in cutting-edge technologies (AI, blockchain, cloud)
- Global team with local support

## Common Questions

**Q: What services does Hcode Technologies offer?**
A: Hcode specializes in AI integration, blockchain development, MVP development, and providing dedicated development teams (Team as a Service).

**Q: Who founded Hcode Technologies?**
A: Hcode was co-founded by Shashank Singla and Shweta Singla, both IIT Delhi graduates with extensive experience at Goldman Sachs and successful tech ventures.

**Q: What is Shashank Singla's background?**
A: Shashank is a serial entrepreneur and product builder with 2 AI exits. He previously founded Dextro (acquired by Axon), worked at Human Ventures and Goldman Sachs, and currently serves as CTO for an Adtech startup.

**Q: Where is Hcode Technologies located?**
A: Hcode is headquartered in Karnal, Haryana, India, with clients globally across USA, Europe, and Asia.

**Q: What technologies does Hcode work with?**
A: Hcode works with React.js, Node.js, Python, AI/ML frameworks, blockchain technologies, and full-stack development across web and mobile platforms.

**Q: How experienced is the Hcode team?**
A: The leadership team has 14-16+ years of experience each, with backgrounds at companies like Goldman Sachs, Siemens, Samsung, and Sendinblue/Brevo.

## SEO Keywords
